alkylation reagent: alkylated with 11 mM iodoacetamide for 15 min at room temperature in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 11 mM iodoacetamide for 15 min at room temperature in the dark.
cleavage agent: trypsin was added to the diluted protein sample at 1:50 trypsin-to-protein mass ratio.
instrument: the peptides were subjected to NSI source followed by tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) in Orbitrap Fusion™.
ionization type: The electrospray voltage applied was 2.0 kV.
labeling: the resulting peptides were desalted with C18 ZipTips according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
reduction reagent: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 30 min at 56°C.
reduction concentration: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 30 min at 56°C.
